strengths: Significantly exceeds experience requirement with 16+ years as full-stack engineer; currently at staff level with leadership on AI-agent infrastructure projects

Strong production experience across primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) with proven ability to build scalable systems—handled millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby and millions of annual transactions at Optilyz
Direct AI agent development expertise in current role (MCP code generators, agentic frameworks), addressing a required but specialized skill area
concerns: Nest.js and Vitest—specified as primary stack—not explicitly mentioned; testing frameworks and current Node backend framework not clarified in resume
Security, authentication, and authorization best-practices not prominently demonstrated despite being a required technical skill
PostgreSQL not listed among databases (MongoDB, MySQL mentioned); relational database depth unclear
response.justification: Bogdan substantially exceeds the 6+ year requirement with 16+ years of senior-level full-stack experience and now leads AI-agent infrastructure—directly addressing a rare required skill. His production track record across TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, Docker, and Kubernetes aligns with the primary stack. However, the resume omits explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest (named primary frameworks), and security/auth expertise isn't highlighted. For a mid-senior IC role, his architecture and scalability background suggests rapid framework onboarding, though specific stack confirmation during interview would be prudent.
